Title: Bivalent Histone Modifications Orchestrate Temporal Regulation of Glucosinolate Biosynthesis During Wound‐Induced Stress Responses in Arabidopsis

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: LIKE HETEROCHROMATIN PROTEIN 1; PRC2-associated chromatin protein
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: loss-of-function mutant lhp1-4; 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4 complementation/overexpression; UHPLC metabolite profiling; qRT-PCR; ChIP-qPCR; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Loss of LHP1 increases both aliphatic and indolic glucosinolate accumulation; LHP1 overexpression/complementation restores glucosinolate levels and represses pathway gene expression
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding; 2-week-old seedlings grown under long-day conditions
Common_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: CLF; SWN; PRC2 components; PRC1 components
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: LHP1 binds H3K27me3-marked chromatin and is required for proper H3K27me3 enrichment at glucosinolate pathway genes
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis for H3K27me3/LHP1/active histone marks (accessions not fully listed in text); public datasets PRJNA305274 and PRJNA301697 for active histone marks
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. lhp1-4 mutants accumulated higher aliphatic and indolic glucosinolates than Col-0. 2. LHP1 loss derepressed multiple glucosinolate regulators and biosynthetic genes. 3. 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4 restored gene expression and glucosinolate levels toward wild type. 4. LHP1 is required for stable H3K27me3 occupancy on pathway genes.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Core experimental focus of the paper is epigenetic repression of glucosinolate metabolism by PRC2/LHP1 rather than enzymology of single pathway enzymes.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential epigenetic target to modulate inducible glucosinolate accumulation for defense-related crop improvement, but broad chromatin effects warrant caution.

Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: public ChIP-seq comparison using clf;swn double mutant for H3K27me3 depletion
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Required with SWN for H3K27me3 maintenance on glucosinolate pathway genes, supporting repression of glucosinolate biosynthesis
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding context; non-stressed seedlings for chromatin profiling
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Catalyzes H3K27me3 deposition as part of PRC2
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: public H3K27me3 ChIP-seq reanalysis; RNA-seq GEO GSE239725
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. H3K27me3-enriched glucosinolate genes lose this mark in clf;swn mutants. 2. CLF contributes to stable PRC2-mediated repression of glucosinolate pathway genes.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Analyzed mainly as PRC2 component rather than independently manipulated in this study.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Epigenetic lever for tuning defense metabolite repression, but likely pleiotropic due to genome-wide developmental roles.

Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: public ChIP-seq comparison using clf;swn double mutant for H3K27me3 depletion
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Required with CLF for H3K27me3 maintenance on glucosinolate pathway genes, supporting repression of glucosinolate biosynthesis
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding context; non-stressed seedlings for chromatin profiling
Common_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Catalyzes H3K27me3 deposition as part of PRC2
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: public H3K27me3 ChIP-seq reanalysis; RNA-seq GEO GSE239725
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. H3K27me3-enriched glucosinolate genes lose this mark in clf;swn mutants. 2. SWN contributes to stable PRC2-mediated repression of glucosinolate pathway genes.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Analyzed mainly as PRC2 component rather than independently manipulated in this study.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Epigenetic target class for modulating defense metabolism, with expected pleiotropy.

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4 and 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4; pathway metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4, consistent with enhanced aliphatic glucosinolate accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding time-course context; lhp1-4 mutant background
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MAM1 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 2. Expression was suppressed again in 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4. 3. Supports PRC2/LHP1 repression of aliphatic glucosinolate precursor formation.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Specific catalytic reaction not detailed in text.
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S promoter used for LHP1 transgene, not for MAM1
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4 and 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4; pathway metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4, consistent with enhanced aliphatic glucosinolate accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding time-course context; lhp1-4 mutant background
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MAM3 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 2. Expression was suppressed again in 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4. 3. Supports PRC2/LHP1 repression of aliphatic glucosinolate precursor formation.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Specific catalytic reaction not detailed in text.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis; complementation by 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Strongly upregulated in lhp1-4 and repressed by LHP1 complementation; directly associated with H3K27me3 and LHP1 binding
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: wounding time course; lhp1-4 mutant background
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CYP79F1 is derepressed in lhp1-4. 2. Its locus is enriched with H3K27me3 and LHP1. 3. Repression is restored in 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and associated with H3K27me3/LHP1 occupancy
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CYP79F2 expression is elevated in lhp1-4. 2. Its locus is enriched with H3K27me3 and LHP1. 3. Supports direct PRC2 repression of aliphatic glucosinolate core-structure genes.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis; wounding qRT-PCR validation
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4; locus enriched with H3K27me3/LHP1; part of late-inducible aliphatic wound response
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CYP83A1 is derepressed in lhp1-4. 2. Direct chromatin association with H3K27me3/LHP1 supports PRC2 repression. 3. Shows delayed induction after wounding relative to indolic genes.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: required for storage/modification of target product
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 despite little H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment, suggesting indirect regulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SOT18 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 2. The locus showed little H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment. 3. Likely regulated indirectly downstream of PRC2-controlled regulators.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Important exception to direct chromatin repression model.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis; complementation assay
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and associated with H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment; linked to altered methylsulfinylalkyl glucosinolate formation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidizes methylthioalkyl glucosinolates to methylsulfinylalkyl glucosinolates
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. FMOGS-OX1 is directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1. 2. It is upregulated in lhp1-4 and repressed again by LHP1 complementation. 3. Supports PRC2 control of aliphatic glucosinolate side-chain oxidation.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CYP79B3 expression increased in lhp1-4. 2. Its locus showed H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment. 3. Supports PRC2 repression in the indolic pathway.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4, but not clearly directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1 in this study
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SUR1 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 2. Its locus showed little H3K27me3 in browser analysis. 3. Suggests indirect pathway responses in indolic glucosinolate regulation.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Represents complexity of indolic pathway regulation.

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and heavily enriched with H3K27me3/LHP1; contributes to indolic glucosinolate hydroxylation branch
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates indol-3-ylmethyl glucosinolate toward hydroxyindole glucosinolates
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CYP81F4 is heavily H3K27me3/LHP1-marked. 2. Its transcript was increased in lhp1-4. 3. Indicates direct PRC2 repression of indolic glucosinolate secondary modification.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and strongly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Methylates hydroxyindole glucosinolates to methoxyindole glucosinolates
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IGMT1 belongs to the heavily H3K27me3/LHP1-marked indolic secondary-modification class. 2. IGMT1 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 3. Supports direct PRC2 repression of methoxyindole glucosinolate formation.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and strongly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Methylates hydroxyindole glucosinolates to methoxyindole glucosinolates
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IGMT2 is heavily H3K27me3/LHP1-marked. 2. IGMT2 transcript increased in lhp1-4. 3. Supports direct PRC2 repression of indolic secondary modification.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: aliphatic glucosinolate pathway genes including MAM1; MAM3; CYP79F1; CYP79F2; CYP83A1; SOT18
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: major upstream regulator of aliphatic glucosinolate production; directly repressed by PRC2/LHP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4 and 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis; wound time-course RNA-seq/qRT-PCR
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4 and associated with increased aliphatic glucosinolate production; shows delayed induction after wounding
Regulation_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Direct enrichment of H3K27me3 and LHP1 at locus; H3K27me3 reduced in lhp1-4 and clf;swn backgrounds
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB28 is directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1. 2. MYB28 transcript rises in lhp1-4 and falls after LHP1 complementation. 3. MYB28 participates in the delayed aliphatic wound-induction program.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful regulatory target to enhance inducible aliphatic glucosinolate defenses, but chromatin-level derepression via PRC2 may have pleiotropic effects.

Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: key aliphatic glucosinolate regulator directly repressed by PRC2/LHP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4 and 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4; overexpression of LHP1 strongly represses MYB29 and restores glucosinolate levels
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB29 is directly repressed by PRC2/LHP1. 2. Derepression in lhp1-4 correlates with elevated aliphatic glucosinolates. 3. LHP1 complementation hyper-represses MYB29 relative to wild type in discussion.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Discussion notes stronger repression by 35S::LHP1 than Col-0 for some targets including MYB29.

Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: key aliphatic glucosinolate regulator directly repressed by PRC2/LHP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4 and 35S::LHP1/lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulated in lhp1-4; repression restored by LHP1 complementation
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB76 is directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1. 2. Its transcript increases in lhp1-4. 3. LHP1 complementation represses MYB76 together with restoration of glucosinolate levels.

Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: indolic glucosinolate core-structure genes such as CYP79B2; CYP79B3; CYP83B1; SUR1; SOT16
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: important indolic glucosinolate regulator and part of early wound-inducible program
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis; wound time-course RNA-seq/qRT-PCR
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Moderately upregulated in lhp1-4; locus enriched with H3K27me3/LHP1; induced early after wounding
Regulation_Genes.Epigenetic_Regulation: Direct H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment; indolic genes frequently in bivalent H3K27me3/H3ac chromatin context
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB34 is H3K27me3/LHP1-marked. 2. It is moderately derepressed in lhp1-4. 3. It belongs to the early-inducible indolic glucosinolate response under wounding.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Discussion highlights functional divergence from MYB51 in lhp1-4 background.

Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: dominantly expressed indolic glucosinolate MYB in discussion; directly repressed by PRC2/LHP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Downregulated in lhp1-4 despite H3K27me3/LHP1 enrichment, highlighting complex indolic pathway regulation
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB51 is a direct H3K27me3/LHP1 target. 2. Unlike expectation, MYB51 is downregulated in lhp1-4. 3. This may explain why some indolic biosynthetic genes are not induced despite MYB34 upregulation.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Important exception showing complexity rather than simple derepression.

Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: part of indolic glucosinolate regulatory module directly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in lhp1-4; H3K27me3/LHP1 ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Transcript not significantly changed in lhp1-4 although locus is H3K27me3/LHP1 enriched
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq GEO GSE239725; public ChIP-seq reanalysis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB122 chromatin is marked by H3K27me3/LHP1. 2. Expression is not significantly altered in lhp1-4. 3. Indicates not all direct PRC2 targets respond equally at transcript level.

Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: participates in regulation of indolic glucosinolate production
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: part of PRC2-repressed indolic glucosinolate regulatory network
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: OBP2 locus is highly enriched with H3K27me3/LHP1, supporting direct PRC2 repression of indolic regulatory genes
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: public ChIP-seq reanalysis; RNA-seq GEO GSE239725
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OBP2 belongs to indolic glucosinolate TF genes strongly marked by H3K27me3/LHP1. 2. Supports PRC2 control over indolic regulatory module.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Expression change for OBP2 was not explicitly reported in main text.
